title: 214  What a great service Srila Prabhupada is doing
speaker: HDG Srila Prabhupada

segments.text: Very tiny children without any energy, we don't have spiritual energy now to follow
all the rules and regulations strictly, we are impelled by Maya's illusions and somehow
we came in touch with a pure devotee like Srila Prabhupada who has taken the responsibility
of delivering anyone who has come in touch with him, can you see what a greatest service
he is doing to the mankind, he has come from the spiritual world to please the Supreme
Lord by delivering millions and millions of fallen souls of Kali Yuga for the next 10,000
years, so such a great responsibility Srila Prabhupada has taken, you can just imagine
how fallen we are all, we are all coming from all sorts of sinful backgrounds and we are
all rotting in this material world.
And just by coming in touch with Srila Prabhupada's instructions, his shelter, we are really relieved
from Maya's torture and we have a hope of going back to God just by following Srila
Prabhupada's instructions.
He is the only hope for us, there is no other link for us between us and Krishna, he is
the only person because he is the only person who is able to tell us, you do this, you don't
do this.
Or else if you take scriptures on our own, you will not be able to do this, you will
not be able to do this, you will not be able to do this, you will not be able to do this,
you will not be able to do this, you will not be able to do this.
If you take scriptures on your own and try to read, you will be fully confused, we don't
know what to follow and what not to follow, it's totally confusing.
So without the help of a spiritual master, it's impossible to go back to godhead.
So it is our duty to somehow or other stick to the instructions given by Guru and then
execute it to the best of our ability.
In this way we will be able to overcome Maya's influence and we will come back to our normal
condition.
Thank you.
